name: CCELL - Palm Pro Battery
summary: The Palm Pro Battery by CCELL is a compact 510 battery that fits perfectly in your hand and delivers consistent, high-quality vaping.
description: The Palm Pro Battery by CCELL is a compact 510 battery that fits perfectly in your hand and delivers consistent, high-quality vaping. It features a 500mAh built-in battery, adjustable voltage, airflow control, and a pre-heating function. With its lightweight, long-lasting design, the Palm Pro is comfortable to hold and compatible with most 510 threaded cartridges. If you enjoy using concentrate cartridges and want a sleek, top-of-the-line 510 vape battery, the new Palm Pro has you covered. Pairs with standard 510 cartridges.
